title: Vanilla Perfected - IMP Edition
description: IMP Edition of the Vanilla Perfected Modpack
body:
# IMP Addon Pack for Vanilla Perfected

**This pack is based on** the excellent [Vanilla Perfected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected) by **demonjoeTV** and is used for the *Moon Imperium (IMP)* Minecraft project.  

It keeps the core VP experience intact and adds a carefully curated set of **quality-of-life**, **visual/immersion**, and **multiplayer** enhancements.  

We also provide sensible **default configs** so players can jump in without extra setup.


> TL;DR: *Vanilla Perfected* foundation + IMP extras (client QoL, mapping, audio, voice chat, small usability tweaks).

---

## What’s new compared to Vanilla Perfected?

### Highlights
- **Client QoL & UI**: Inventory Profiles Next, REI, Jade, Mouse Tweaks, More Chat History, Language Reload, AppleSkin, Chat Heads, Chat Animation, libIPN (for IPN).
- **Exploration & Mapping**: JourneyMap with tuned defaults (cleaner icons, minimap off by default, refined keybinds).
- **Audio & Immersion**: AmbientSounds, Presence Footsteps, Sound Physics Remastered, Dynamic FPS, Falling Leaves.
- **Visuals & World view**: Distant Horizons (LOD/long-distance terrain), Capes.
- **Utility / Gameplay**: Freecam (with collision enabled), FSIT (sit/lie), Inertia AntiCheat (client-side helper), Architectury (library).
- **Multiplayer**: Simple Voice Chat

> Nothing in here changes core progression or adds content-heavy gameplay. The goal is a **polished vanilla+ client** tuned for the IMP server.

---

## Included Mods (A–Z)
- **AmbientSounds**  
- **AppleSkin**  
- **Architectury** *(library)*  
- **Capes**  
- **Chat Animation**  
- **Chat Heads**  
- **CreativeCore** *(library for some mods)*  
- **DistantHorizons** *(LOD / far render)*  
- **Dynamic FPS**  
- **Falling Leaves**  
- **Freecam** *(collision enabled by default)*  
- **FSIT** *(sit / lie)*  
- **InertiaAntiCheat**  
- **InventoryProfilesNext** *(with libIPN)*  
- **Jade**  
- **JourneyMap**  
- **Just Enough Breeding**  
- **Language Reload**  
- **libIPN** *(InventoryProfilesNext library)*  
- **More Chat History**  
- **Presence Footsteps**  
- **REI (Roughly Enough Items)**  
- **RRL (Resource Reload Speedup)**  
- **Simple Voice Chat**  
- **Sound Physics Remastered**  

> Note: Some entries are libraries required by the above mods.

---

## Included Shaderpacks
- **BSL Shaders**  
- **Complementary Shaders – Unbound**  
- **MakeUp – Ultra Fast**  
- **Solas Shader**  
- **Super Duper Vanilla**

> Shaders are optional and can be toggled per player. Choose what runs best on your hardware.

---

## Configuration Changes & Defaults

### General
- **Display**: Borderless Mode → **Fullscreen Mode** (for consistent behavior).  
- **GUI Scale**: **2×** by default (readable on most displays).

### Audio
- Balanced volumes across audio/footstep/ambience mods for a coherent sound mix.

### JourneyMap
- **Minimap icons** (player & mobs): **smaller + cleaner**, **hidden by default** to reduce clutter.  
- **Theme**: adjusted for better readability.  
- **Keybinds**:  
  - Unbound JourneyMap **`C`** (“chat at cursor position”) so **Zoomify** can use **`C`** again.  
  - Unbound **`M`** and **`N`** to avoid conflicts with **Simple Voice Chat**.  

### Server List
- **IMP Server** entry pre-added (you can still add/edit your own servers).

### Inventory Profiles Next
- **Hotbar Autofill icons**: hidden.  
- Wooden & Stone **Pickaxe** types added to **autofill ignore** list (prevents unwanted swaps early game).

### Freecam
- **Collision**: enabled to avoid phasing through blocks on public servers.

---

## Project Scope & Philosophy
- Keep the **Vanilla Perfected** feel.  
- Ship **useful defaults** so new players are productive from minute one.  
- Avoid content bloat; this is a **client polish** pack for the Moon Imperium server.

---

## Credits

All credits for the base pack to **[demonjoeTV](https://modrinth.com/user/demonjoeTV)** and the **[Vanilla Perfected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected)** project.

> Also thank you to **Vanilla Tweaks** for allowing the usage of their resource pack in Vanilla Perfected!  
> Credits: **Vanilla Tweaks** — https://vanillatweaks.net/
